SEO Services

Rank for the searchesthat actually convert.

Search rankings built around the keywords your buyers use right before they hire someone. Technical work, content, and links all mapped to revenue, not audit scores.

Get Your SEO RoadmapView Our Work

Most businesses rank for terms that never convert

You can sit on page one and still hear crickets. That usually means you are winning searches from people who were never going to hire you.

  • Monthly reports full of impressions while qualified leads stay flat.
  • Blog posts go live with no keyword intent and no clear next step for the reader.
  • Technical fixes stack up in a backlog while the pages that actually sell stay broken.
  • Link building chases domain authority scores instead of relevance in your market.

SEO built around keywords that buy

  • Keyword maps tied to service pages and content that moves people toward a booked call.
  • Technical work prioritized by revenue impact, not audit score.
  • Content aimed at commercial and transactional intent, not informational fluff.
  • Reporting on leads, cost per acquisition, and pipeline. Rankings are context, not the headline.

Proof it works

Trust signals from real client work, not vanity metrics.

Case Study

Landscaping Company

Five years of generic SEO. Rankings on paper, empty calendar in practice. Most traffic came from DIY gardeners, not homeowners ready to hire.

Qualified leads grew 4.8× in 10 months. Organic traffic up 1,290%. Rankings improved across 340+ commercial-intent keywords.

Read the full case study

“For the first time we could see which keywords turned into booked jobs. That changed how we thought about the whole program.”

Operations DirectorProfessional Services Firm

Why Most SEO Campaigns Fail

Wrong keywords, unprioritized technical fixes, and reports that celebrate traffic your sales team never sees.

#1+4
#3+2
#5+7
#8+1

Landscaping Co.

01

Issue 01

Wrong keywords win

Your agency celebrates traffic from searches nobody in your sales pipeline ever typed.

02

Issue 02

Technical work without priority

Hundreds of crawl fixes sit in a spreadsheet while the pages that actually sell stay broken.

03

Issue 03

Content without a next step

Blog posts rank. Visitors read. Then they leave because nothing on the page asks them to act.

04

Issue 04

Reports that miss the point

Position 4 for a term you never wanted. Zero booked calls. The dashboard still looks green.

Technical SEO Audit

Find what's blocking your highest-value pages from ranking.

Crawl & Indexation

Orphan pages, redirect chains, index bloat

Week 1

Core Web Vitals

LCP, CLS, mobile usability

Week 1

Schema & Structure

Structured data on revenue pages

Week 1

Ranking Strategy

We prioritize keywords by business impact, not just search volume. The focus stays on terms that signal buying intent and rank within reach. The goal is to identify what your competitors are ignoring and build authority in the spaces where winning is realistic.

local seo services

Buyers actively looking for agency help. Not researching, deciding.

Commercial

seo for landscapers

Niche vertical, low competition, clear commercial intent

Local

seo agency pricing

Decision-stage query from business owners comparing their options

Commercial

google business optimization

Direct map pack signal that drives local calls and clicks

Local

Content Strategy

Strong rankings emerge when four systems work in sync: technical health, content authority, link equity, and user experience. Most sites underinvest in at least one of them. That gap is precisely where sustainable growth opportunities live.

Technical Foundation

Site speed, mobile, crawlability

Content Authority

Search intent matching, topical depth

Link Equity

Authority signals, trusted citations

User Experience

Engagement, conversion signals

Technical SEO

Modern results include AI overviews, featured snippets, local packs, and video carousels. Each is a distinct entry point for your business. Winning means earning visibility across all of them, not just ranking somewhere on page one.

Featured Snippets

Position 0. The top answer pulled directly into search results.

12.3% of searches

Local 3-Pack

The map + listing block for local-intent searches. Critical for service businesses.

30% of mobile searches

AI Overviews

Google's AI-generated answers. Changes the game for informational queries.

Growing rapidly

Video Carousels

Short-form and long-form video surfaced directly in results. YouTube and Shorts both feed it.

62% of SERPs on mobile

How we grow search traffic

A clear process that combines technical fixes, strong content, and smart link building.

  1. Phase 1

    Technical Foundation

    Full site crawl identifying indexing gaps, speed bottlenecks, mobile issues, and schema opportunities. Every issue prioritized by revenue impact.

    Full technical audit delivered in week 1

  2. Phase 2

    Keyword Research

    We map what your buyers actually search for, find content gaps your competitors miss, and prioritize terms most likely to convert.

    Avg. 340 keywords mapped per client

  3. Phase 3

    Content That Ranks

    Every page tuned for relevance and authority. New content fills gaps in your topic coverage, matched to what searchers want at each stage.

    Avg. 4.2x traffic increase per article

  4. Phase 4

    Building Authority

    Links earned through real relationships, digital PR, and content worth citing.

    40+ authority domains per quarter

  5. Phase 5

    Ongoing Optimization

    Weekly rank tracking, monthly reports, and quarterly strategy reviews. What we learn goes right back into the work.

    Weekly rank tracking and monthly reporting

What you get with our SEO program

Six deliverables. One organic growth system.

Scope of work

  • Technical SEO Audit and Fix Plan

    Crawl analysis, Core Web Vitals review, indexation fixes, and schema markup on priority revenue pages.

  • Keyword and Content Strategy

    Buyer-intent keyword research, content gaps, and a publishing calendar mapped to your sales funnel.

  • On-Page Optimization

    Title tags, headings, internal links, and page structure updates on pages that drive leads.

  • Content Production

    Service pages, blog posts, and landing pages written for search intent and conversion.

  • Link Building and Digital PR

    Outreach, guest placements, and authority links from relevant sites in your industry.

  • Monthly Performance Reporting

    Rankings, traffic, leads, and pipeline tied to specific keywords and pages you can act on.

Results we track

Real outcomes from recent client programs.

+1,290%

organic traffic · Landscaping Co.

4.8X

qualified leads · same client, 10 mo

340+

commercial keywords mapped per engagement

Transparent Pricing

See what's included at each tier.

Fixed scope. No surprise fees on the invoice.

See Pricing
Common Questions

FAQ

How long does SEO take to show results?>

Meaningful ranking movement typically begins within 3–4 months. Revenue impact becomes clear around months 6–12. SEO compounds over time. Every fix and piece of content keeps working long after it's published.

What does your SEO service include?>

Every engagement includes a full technical audit, keyword research, on-page optimization, link building, content strategy, and monthly reporting. The mix shifts by priority based on what will move the needle fastest for your business.

Do you work with local businesses?>

Yes. Local SEO is one of our core strengths. We optimize Google Business Profiles, build local citations, and produce location-specific content to help service businesses dominate their market area.

How do you report on SEO performance?>

Weekly rank tracking, monthly dashboards covering traffic, leads, and conversions, and quarterly strategy reviews. We tie every metric back to pipeline and revenue, not vanity numbers.

Will SEO still work as AI search evolves?>

Yes. Strong technical SEO, authoritative content, and quality links remain the foundation of visibility in AI-powered search results. We stay ahead of how results are displayed (featured snippets, AI Overviews, local packs) and adapt our strategy accordingly.

How much does SEO cost with KINEXIS?>

Most SEO retainers run $2,500 to $8,000 per month based on market competition, number of locations, and content volume. We give you a fixed scope and price after a strategy call, with no hidden add-ons.

How long until SEO produces leads?>

Expect early ranking movement in 60 to 90 days. Consistent lead growth usually shows up between months 4 and 6. Competitive industries may take longer, but we track progress monthly so you see what is working.

Do you guarantee first-page rankings?>

No ethical agency guarantees specific positions. We guarantee a clear strategy, consistent execution, and reporting tied to leads and revenue. Our clients have seen organic lead growth of 80% to 140% within the first year.

What is included in your SEO audits?>

Technical crawl issues, page speed, mobile usability, indexation, on-page gaps, competitor keyword overlap, and backlink profile review. You get a prioritized fix list ranked by revenue impact.
